Kaggle CLI Documentation","","Welcome to the Kaggle CLI documentation. This guide provides detailed information on how to use the Kaggle command-line interface to interact with Kaggle's platform.","","## Installation","","Note: Ensure you have Python 3.11+ and the package manager `pip` installed.","","Install the `kaggle` package with [pip](https://pypi.org/project/pip/):","","```sh","pip install kaggle","```","","If you run into a `Command kaggle not found` error, ensure that your Python executable scripts are in your $PATH. For a local user install on Linux, the default location is `~/.local/bin`. On Windows, the default location is `$PYTHON_HOME/Scripts`.","","## Authentication","","First, you will need a Kaggle account. You can sign up [here](https://www.kaggle.com/account/login).","","After login, you can download your Kaggle API credentials at https://www.kaggle.com/settings by clicking on the \"Generate New Token\" button under the \"API\" section.","","### Option 1: Environment variable","","```sh","export KAGGLE_API_TOKEN=xxxxxxxxxxxxxx # Copied from the settings UI","```","","### Option 2: API token file","","Store your Kaggle API token obtained from your [Kaggle account settings page](https://www.kaggle.com/settings) in a file at `~/.kaggle/access_token`.","","### Option 3: Legacy API credentials file","","From your [Kaggle account settings page](https://www.kaggle.com/settings), under \"Legacy API Credentials\", click on the \"Create Legacy API Key\" button to generate a `kaggle.json` file and store it at `~/.kaggle/kaggle.json`.","","## CLI Usage","","Run the following command to list the available commands:","","```sh","kaggle --help","```","","The Kaggle CLI is organized into several command groups:","","*   [Competitions](./competitions.md): Manage and participate in Kaggle competitions.","*   [Datasets](./datasets.md): Search, download, and manage Kaggle datasets.","*   [Kernels](./kernels.md): Interact with Kaggle Kernels (notebooks and scripts).","*   [Models](./models.md): Manage your Kaggle Models.","*   [Model Variations](./model_variations.md): Manage variations of your Kaggle Models.","*   [Model Variation Versions](./model_variations_versions.md): Manage versions of your Kaggle Model Variations.","*   [Configuration](./configuration.md): Configure the Kaggle CLI.","","## Tutorials","","Explore these tutorials to learn how to perform common tasks:","","*   [Tutorials](./tutorials.md)","    *   [Create a Dataset](./tutorials.md#tutorial-create-a-dataset)","    *   [Find and Download a Dataset](./tutorials.md#tutorial-find-and-download-a-dataset)","    *   [Create a Model](./tutorials.md#tutorial-create-a-model)","    *   [Create a Model Variation](./tutorials.md#tutorial-create-a-model-variation)","    *   [Create a Model Variation Version](./tutorials.md#tutorial-create-a-model-variation-version)","    *   [How to Submit to a Competition](./tutorials.md#tutorial-how-to-submit-to-a-competition)","    *   [How to Submit to a Code Competition](./tutorials.md#tutorial-how-to-submit-to-a-code-competition)"],"stylingDirectives":[[[0,26,"pl-mh"],[2,26,"pl-en"]],[],[],[],[[0,15,"pl-mh"],[3,15,"pl-en"]],[],[[59,60,"pl-s"],[60,63,"pl-c1"],[63,64,"pl-s"]],[],[[12,13,"pl-s"],[13,19,"pl-c1"],[19,20,"pl-s"],[34,35,"pl-s"],[38,39,"pl-s"],[39,40,"pl-s"],[40,69,"pl-corl"],[69,70,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,5,"pl-en"]],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"]],[],[[18,19,"pl-s"],[19,43,"pl-c1"],[43,44,"pl-s"],[173,174,"pl-s"],[174,186,"pl-c1"],[186,187,"pl-s"],[225,226,"pl-s"],[226,246,"pl-c1"],[246,247,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,17,"pl-mh"],[3,17,"pl-en"]],[],[[55,56,"pl-s"],[60,61,"pl-s"],[61,62,"pl-s"],[62,98,"pl-corl"],[98,99,"pl-s"]],[],[[61,92,"pl-corl"]],[],[[0,34,"pl-mh"],[4,34,"pl-en"]],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,5,"pl-en"]],[[0,6,"pl-k"],[39,68,"pl-c"],[39,40,"pl-c"]],[[0,3,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,28,"pl-mh"],[4,28,"pl-en"]],[],[[47,48,"pl-s"],[76,77,"pl-s"],[77,78,"pl-s"],[78,109,"pl-corl"],[109,110,"pl-s"],[124,125,"pl-s"],[125,147,"pl-c1"],[147,148,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,41,"pl-mh"],[4,41,"pl-en"]],[],[[10,11,"pl-s"],[39,40,"pl-s"],[40,41,"pl-s"],[41,72,"pl-corl"],[72,73,"pl-s"],[165,166,"pl-s"],[166,177,"pl-c1"],[177,178,"pl-s"],[200,201,"pl-s"],[201,222,"pl-c1"],[222,223,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,12,"pl-mh"],[3,12,"pl-en"]],[],[],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,5,"pl-en"]],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"]],[],[],[],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[17,18,"pl-s"],[18,19,"pl-s"],[19,36,"pl-corl"],[36,37,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[13,14,"pl-s"],[14,15,"pl-s"],[15,28,"pl-corl"],[28,29,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[12,13,"pl-s"],[13,14,"pl-s"],[14,26,"pl-corl"],[26,27,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[11,12,"pl-s"],[12,13,"pl-s"],[13,24,"pl-corl"],[24,25,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[21,22,"pl-s"],[22,23,"pl-s"],[23,44,"pl-corl"],[44,45,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[29,30,"pl-s"],[30,31,"pl-s"],[31,61,"pl-corl"],[61,62,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[18,19,"pl-s"],[19,20,"pl-s"],[20,38,"pl-corl"],[38,39,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,12,"pl-mh"],[3,12,"pl-en"]],[],[],[],[ <p dir="auto">Welcome to the Kaggle CLI documentation. This guide provides detailed information on how to use the Kaggle command-line interface to interact with Kaggle's platform.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Installation</h2><a id="user-content-installation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Installation" href="#installation"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Note: Ensure you have Python 3.11+ and the package manager <code>pip</code> installed.</p>
<p dir="auto">Install the <code>kaggle</code> package with <a href="https://pypi.org/project/pip/" rel="nofollow">pip</a>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>pip install kaggle</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="pip install kaggle" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>

<p dir="auto">If you run into a <code>Command kaggle not found</code> error, ensure that your Python executable scripts are in your $PATH. For a local user install on Linux, the default location is <code>~/.local/bin</code>. On Windows, the default location is <code>$PYTHON_HOME/Scripts</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Authentication</h2><a id="user-content-authentication" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Authentication" href="#authentication"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">First, you will need a Kaggle account. You can sign up <a href="https://www.kaggle.com/account/login" rel="nofollow">here</a>.</p>
<p dir="auto">After login, you can download your Kaggle API credentials at <a href="https://www.kaggle.com/settings" rel="nofollow">https://www.kaggle.com/settings</a> by clicking on the "Generate New Token" button under the "API" section.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Option 1: Environment variable</h3><a id="user-content-option-1-environment-variable" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Option 1: Environment variable" href="#option-1-environment-variable"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">export</span> KAGGLE_API_TOKEN=xxxxxxxxxxxxxx <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Copied from the settings UI</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="export KAGGLE_API_TOKEN=xxxxxxxxxxxxxx # Copied from the settings UI" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Option 2: API token file</h3><a id="user-content-option-2-api-token-file" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Option 2: API token file" href="#option-2-api-token-file"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Store your Kaggle API token obtained from your <a href="https://www.kaggle.com/settings" rel="nofollow">Kaggle account settings page</a> in a file at <code>~/.kaggle/access_token</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Option 3: Legacy API credentials file</h3><a id="user-content-option-3-legacy-api-credentials-file" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Option 3: Legacy API credentials file" href="#option-3-legacy-api-credentials-file"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">From your <a href="https://www.kaggle.com/settings" rel="nofollow">Kaggle account settings page</a>, under "Legacy API Credentials", click on the "Create Legacy API Key" button to generate a <code>kaggle.json</code> file and store it at <code>~/.kaggle/kaggle.json</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">CLI Usage</h2><a id="user-content-cli-usage" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: CLI Usage" href="#cli-usage"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Run the following command to list the available commands:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>kaggle --help</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="kaggle --help" tabindex="0" role="button">

    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>

<p dir="auto">The Kaggle CLI is organized into several command groups:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/competitions.md">Competitions</a>: Manage and participate in Kaggle competitions.</li>
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/datasets.md">Datasets</a>: Search, download, and manage Kaggle datasets.</li>
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/kernels.md">Kernels</a>: Interact with Kaggle Kernels (notebooks and scripts).</li>
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/models.md">Models</a>: Manage your Kaggle Models.</li>
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/model_variations.md">Model Variations</a>: Manage variations of your Kaggle Models.</li>
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/model_variations_versions.md">Model Variation Versions</a>: Manage versions of your Kaggle Model Variations.</li>
<li><a href="/Kaggle/kaggle-cli/blob/main/docs/configuration.md">Configuration</a>: Configure the Kaggle CLI.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tutorials</h2><a id="user-content-tutorials" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tutorials" href="#tutorials"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
